themes.reasoning_notes: ETB tutors an Aura from graveyard, hand, or library directly onto itself, making it a dedicated Aura payoff/enabler.
Can retrieve an Aura from the graveyard to the battlefield, but only incidentally within its Aura-focused ETB effect.
ETB finds any Aura from hand, graveyard, or library and puts it straight onto itself; this is a very strong Aura-specific payoff/enabler.
It can recover an Aura from the graveyard, but only as part of its broader Aura-search ETB rather than as dedicated recursion.
